compressed_prompt: compose rock song lyrics for 'the gifted and the not gifted' in all caps, avoiding the word "rock
response:
HERE WE STAND, DIVIDED WE FALL
THE CHOSEN FEW, AGAINST THE REST OF ALL
THEY'VE GOT THE TOUCH, THEY'VE GOT THE FLAIR
WHILE WE'RE JUST TRYING TO SHOW WE CARE

THEY SHINE SO BRIGHT, LIKE STARS IN THE NIGHT
THEIR TALENT'S A GIFT, A SHINING LIGHT
THEY'RE THE ONES WHO'LL MAKE IT TO THE TOP
WHILE WE'RE JUST TRYING NOT TO STOP

BUT WE WON'T BE LEFT BEHIND, WE WON'T BE IGNORED
WE'LL FIND OUR OWN WAY, WE'LL BE EXPLORED
WE MAY NOT BE THE BEST, BUT WE'LL GIVE IT A GO
WE'LL RISE UP, WE'LL SHOW THEM WE'RE NOT SLOW

THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED, WE'RE ALL IN THIS TOGETHER
WE'LL STAND AS ONE, WE'LL FEEL THE FEATHER
OF THE WIND THAT BLOWS, OF THE FIRE THAT BURNS
WE'LL RISE UP, WE'LL LEARN, WE'LL YEARN

THEY MAY HAVE THE TALENT, BUT WE'VE GOT THE HEART
WE'LL FIGHT FOR OUR PLACE, WE'LL NEVER DEPART
FROM THE DREAM WE SHARE, FROM THE GOAL WE CHASE
WE'LL RUN WITH THE PACK, WE'LL FIND OUR OWN PLACE

THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED, WE'LL STAND AS ONE
TOGETHER WE'LL RISE, UNDER THE SAME SUN.
